extraction.one_line_summary: BOUWMAN Koen attacked 300m from finish after 2:00 gap at 30km, survived despite dual FDJ-Cofidis chase with 46kph average speed on ascending finale.
tactical_patterns: BOUWMAN teammate VERMEULEN sacrificed tempo setting final 20km, enabling late attack against slower breakaway companions when peloton within striking distance.
Dual team chase FDJ-Cofidis failed controlling 2:00 gap despite 40km flat runway, suggesting sprint teams underestimated ascending finale drag.
Break lost only 10sec/km final kilometers with tailwind on ascending finale, significantly slower attrition than typical flat sprint chase dynamics.

rider_signals.BOUWMAN Koen: positive: Won from break while wearing polka dots, attacked companions 300m out after sustained climbing effort shows exceptional durability for non-sprinter.
rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: neutral: Won peloton sprint for green jersey after team chase failed, confirms fast-twitch preserved but positioning tactics inadequate.
rider_signals.DE GENDT Thomas: neutral: Finished second in break sprint to BOUWMAN, confirms veteran's break success rate but reveals finishing speed deficit.
